features: Package contents: 4 gift bags medium (27*21*8 cm), 4 bow decorations, 4 greeting cards, suitable for medium-sized gifts, which can basically meet your gift packaging needs

Material: Our paper gift bags with handles are made of thick material, not easy to tear, good load-bearing capacity, smooth surface, and have a certain degree of waterproofness. They can be used to store various gifts, such as wine, cosmetics, jewelry, etc
Simple design: The birthday gift bag adopts a patternless design, which is very advanced and looks very high-quality and elegant. Of course, you can doodle on it to create the style you want
Suitable for personalized design: The bow decoration can be moved freely, making it easier for you to design the gift bag according to your wishes, making each gift unique and creative

Multi-function: The 4 gift bags for presents are an ideal gift bag for children's birthdays or corporate events, and is also suitable for gifts at weddings, graduation parties and anniversaries. Elegant gift bags make every gift you give the center of attention
